Done! I've analyzed both documents and saved the analysis to `secrets/docs/incident-changelog-analysis.txt`.

**Summary:** The incident (IR-2024-0042) was caused by a compromised service account (`svc-analytics`) whose password was accidentally committed to a public GitHub repository. This is an operational security failure unrelated to any software releases in the changelog. The changelog only documents application-level code changes (API endpoints, bug fixes) from early 2024, while the incident stems from credential management and repository visibility control issues.
